strategy: Do not cast your own spells at her. Any spell you cast, even AoE, Polymorphs you into a Statue for 99 Rounds with a near-useless Pass deck.
Instead, use only the Blindfolded Hit cards she gives all non-statue wizards at the end of every other Round; those are your only safe way to damage her.
If you defeat her with anything other than a Blindfolded Hit, she Blessing-heals to full, so land the killing blow with a Blindfolded Hit.
Play patient: survive her hits, collect a Blindfolded Hit each cycle, and bank them.
Finish her with a Blindfolded Hit while never casting any of your own damage spells.
cheatNotes: Casting any spell on her, including AoE, turns you to Statue for 99 Rounds; only use the Blindfolded Hit cards she provides.
As a Statue your deck is 77 Pass cards and one Break Free, so being petrified nearly removes you; never cast your own spells.
Killing her with anything but a Blindfolded Hit makes her full-heal; land the finisher with a Blindfolded Hit.
Every other Round she hands all non-statue wizards a Blindfolded Hit; these are your only damage, so bank them.
